problem id: 0f8fe647
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  01000000 -> 11101111
  10011111 -> 11100001
  00111000 -> 00110001
  11110110 -> 11110011
  11100001 -> 10001111
  11011000 -> 00001001
  10011101 -> 01110001
  11011111 -> 11110001
  01010001 -> 00100011

query: 01101010
predicted answer: 00110101
